A test to verify the behavior of adding and negating `Number.MIN_VALUE` in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a single assertion statement that tests a specific behavior of JavaScript's `Number.MIN_VALUE`. It checks whether adding the negative of `Number.MIN_VALUE` to `Number.MIN_VALUE` results in positive zero (`+0`). The assertion uses the logical negation operator to ensure that the expression evaluates to `true`, confirming the expected behavior of floating-point arithmetic in JavaScript. This code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a precise aspect of number handling in the language.
